authorized_domains.description: List of domains authorized for use with Identity Platform; required for configuring OAuth clients and custom domains.

autodelete_anonymous_users.description: Controls whether anonymous user accounts are automatically deleted after a specified period of inactivity. Must be set to true or false.

blocking_functions.description: Defines the configuration for blocking functions, including the triggers and endpoints for custom authentication logic, used to enforce additional checks during user sign-in or sign-up processes.
blocking_functions.type: list(object({forward_inbound_credentials: list(object({access_token: optional(bool),id_token: optional(bool),refresh_token: optional(bool)})),triggers: list(object({event_type: string,function_uri: string,update_time: optional(string)}))}))

client.description: Defines the OAuth 2.0 client ID used for authenticating users with external identity providers.
client.type: list(object({api_key: optional(string),firebase_subdomain: optional(string),permissions: list(object({disabled_user_deletion: optional(bool),disabled_user_signup: optional(bool)}))}))

mfa.description: Specifies whether multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enabled for Identity Platform, requiring users to provide additional verification during sign-in.
mfa.type: list(object({enabled_providers: optional(list(string)),state: optional(string),provider_configs: list(object({state: optional(string),totp_provider_config: list(object({adjacent_intervals: optional(number)}))}))}))

monitoring.description: Determines whether monitoring is enabled for the Identity Platform project, allowing visibility into usage and performance metrics.

multi_tenant.description: Indicates whether multi-tenancy is enabled for the Identity Platform, allowing multiple tenants to share the same project resources.

quota.description: Configures the quota settings for Identity Platform, including limitations on API requests and other usage constraints.

sign_in.description: Configures the authentication methods for users, specifying allowed sign-in options such as email/password, phone number, or third-party providers.
sign_in.type: list(object({allow_duplicate_emails: optional(bool),hash_config: optional(list(object({algorithm=string,memory_cost=number,rounds=number,salt_separator=string,signer_key=string}))),anonymous: list(object({enabled: bool})),email: list(object({enabled: bool,password_required: optional(bool)})),phone_number: list(object({enabled: bool,test_phone_numbers: optional(map(string))}))}))

sms_region_config.description: Defines the regions where SMS-based multi-factor authentication is allowed or blocked, ensuring compliance with regional regulations and requirements.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for the configuration to be created, updated, or deleted.
